creator: timur@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Mon, Jun 18, 2007 at 07:06:39PM -0700, bf wrote:
> 
> The popt change I suggested was just a minor detail,
> and is not necessary at this time, because, as far as
> I can tell, the subports aren't currently making use
> of popt. 

This is done on purpose and actually for subports I've switched built-in
version of the library - for slave ports I'd like to have as less
external dependencies as possible.

> The other two OPTIONS changes were also minor details,
> and were corrections of spelling errors:

Ah, thanks, spelling is my persistent problem :) I'll fix it with the
next update.

I'm closing this PR by now.

Thanks a lot for your help!

With regards,
Timur.
